name: Playback Indicator
description: Shows direct play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows, auto-detected from your current device. ALPHA — NOT PRODUCTION READY.
overview: Shows direct play / transcode status badges on episode and movie rows in the Jellyfin web UI, auto-detected from your current device.

versions.changelog: Replace HTTP self-calls with internal Jellyfin APIs (ILibraryManager, IMediaSourceManager) to fix Unauthorized errors
